name: Jumbo Shrimp Marsalla, Housewife Style
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red onion, chopped into 1/2-inch pieces
1 rib celery with leaves, chopped into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Peel and de-vein shrimp.
3. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a 12- to 14-inch earthenware casserole (both stove- and oven-resistant) until hot.
4. Add onion and celery, cooking until soft.
5. Stir in tomatoes, pine nuts, currants, capers, Marsala wine, fennel stalk, and bay leaf. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and arrange shrimp in one layer at the bottom of the casserole.
7. Place casserole in oven and bake uncovered for 6 to 7 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and sprinkle with Pecorino cheese.
9. Allow dish to stand for 15 minutes before serving warm or refrigerating and serving cold.
Yield: 4 servings
